title: Chapter 1
content:
Chapter 1: Reboot

*Thunder*

The winds are blowing heavy, dark clouds are covering the sky and a heavy downpour of rain is about to start any second

...

"Hey, check out my new dress, how do I look?"

"Wow, this dress is stunning. It looks really good on you"

The mall is bustling with people and everyone is in a hurry to purchase the stuff they came for scram since a heavy rain was forecasted by the weather analysts and even if they didn’t, anyone with eyes could see the dark clouds forming.

Women’s cosmetic section, 2nd floor...

A young man around the age of 24, had black eyes, black hairs, fair skin tone and a medium looking face, he was not considered handsome but also wouldn’t be considered ugly, just in between....average.

He was sitting on the desk with a porn manga in his hands.

"Yes, Johnny! Now tie her hands up to the pole and fuck the living brains out of her. Don’t give her any breathing space" he said with excitement and thrill as he swiped to the next page

"Noooo, what the hell are you doing Johnny, you fucking idiot... Why would you tell her you love her! The only love she deserves is being tied up and getting fucked endlessly by your cock. This is fucking stupid, possibly the worst of all I’ve read" He spoke with a very unpleasant expression on his face.

A girl with blond hair also dressed in the mall’s workers uniform came up behind the man reading the porn manga with disgust clearly visible on her face.

"Maybe if you can get off from that porn manga, you can get some girls in real life, Denzel"

"Maybe, but I would say you are living example of why that wouldn’t work. You don’t read the porn mangas and you still can’t get no man. Makes me want to fuck you out of pity, virgin" Denzel spoke while turning towards her direction looking towards her face initially and then his eyes drifted downwards towards her tits and his face changing to a perverted expression. They were massive

"Yeah, yeah I hear you. A virgin lecturing a virgin thats unheard of. But you must be so dumb to even think that these porn stories are real. Your friend’s mother jumped on you because her husband wasn’t having sex with her? That’s fucking stupid. This is real world and things work differently. You can’t fuck a MILF unless she is a prostitute.

So, get these stories out of your mind and get to work." The blonde girl replied with a serious expression on her face as she turned away

"What work are you talking about? Look at the news, everyone is closing due to the heavy rai–"

*Ding*

Suddenly, A message arrived on both of their phones.

The blonde girl was the first to get to her phone and opened up the message

"Hey Denzel, its the manager, he says that we should close the shop and go home. It’s going to rain for an entire day, can you imagine that? Crazy times really" the blonde girl said with an appalling expression

"Well, isnt that great news! I have enough time to read up on all these mangas i’ve been leaving for dust" Denzel said while closing the manga in his hand and preparing for closing

"I guess you will never change. Well... Everything is almost closed, just shut off the lights and we are good to go." The blonde girl spoke.

"Okay... Here, I will be on my way. Please lock the shop and see you after the rain is over."

Denzel spoke as he immediately turned off the switches and ran out of the shop.

"Bastard, leaving all the work for me in the end... When will he get to really understand my feelings?" The blonde girl spoke as she looked at the Denzel’s figure fade out of the mall

...

*Click*

As Denzel came out the mall, the rain has already started to fall.

’Damn, its this heavy and its not even gotten to its full potential yet. I have to get going home before it traps me in this freaking mall’

Denzel pulled up his umbrella in his hand and spread it open then ventured into the run on route to his home

On his way home, he got to a traffic stop that hasnt yet signalled for pedestrians to walk through, he waited there patiently while the downpour increased with every passing minute.

Finally, it signalled and then hastily he rushed to run across the road and that was when a huge wind blew across him

’Whoo...what the heck was that. If I hadn’t held my ground it would have blown me off my feet’

Unknown to him, after the breeze a large vehicle just made a sharp and abrupt turn towards his direction at full speed and slammed towards his body sending him flying through the air.

As soon as he hit the ground, his blood splattered everywhere and he died instantly

...

Just immediately after, Denzel eyes opened and he jolted up in shock with his hands stretched

"Noooooo-"

He screamed his lungs out still in shock from seeing a car at that speed right in front of him. That was when it clicked.

’Wait, I’m very sure that vehicle hit me. There was no way it would miss me at that distance so why...why am I still alive’

He stood up and observed himself better

’What the hell, no injuries even. Thats impossible, I’m very certain I dont have superpowers.’

While still pondering on how he survived the accident without any injuries something else hit him

’Where the hell am I...a forest? This shit is freaking crazy, I know i almost got hit by a car at full speed and not only did I survive unscathed now im in a forest. My mind is literally going to blow up’

[Ding!]

A system notification popped up right in front of him, floating in the air

[Welcome Player, initializing...10%...30%...65%...90%]

[Initialization complete]

[Welcome, Player]

[You have been granted a second chance at life...]

~~~

Bonus Chapters will be unlocked depending on the number of Powerstones donated: starting at 20, then 30, 50, and so on.

Thank you for your support!
